detail.description:
Enter a fantasy world bathed in starlight and begin your very own spirit adventure!

Meet a variety of companions, build your own team, and grow stronger through idle progression and strategic battles.



✨ Game Features



🌟 Spirit Training

Collect spirits of various attributes. Each companion has unique skills and evolution paths to build your ultimate team!



⚔️ Strategic Turn-Based Battles

Combine teams and skills wisely, use elemental advantages and tactics to defeat powerful enemies an
